diminishingReturns.title: Diminishing Return Calculator
diminishingReturns.betaWarning: Beta feature — calculations may contain errors. Please report any errors to NabiCook.
diminishingReturns.subtitle: Stack champion, talent, card, and item effects and estimate their simultaneous in-game values.
diminishingReturns.sourceNote: Formula based on the Official Paladins Wiki. Conditional effects are calculated as if they are active at the same time.
diminishingReturns.noDetectedEffect: No overlapping percentage or baseline stat change was detected in this description.
diminishingReturns.emptyResults: Select a talent, cards, or items with compatible stat effects to calculate a result.
diminishingReturns.effectiveHealthRaw: {value} effective health against this damage type
diminishingReturns.lifeStealRaw: About {value} healing per base weapon hit
diminishingReturns.weaponDamageRaw: About {value} damage per base weapon hit
diminishingReturns.formulaHighest: The highest single bonus keeps its full value. Other simultaneous bonuses diminish once their additive total exceeds 30%.
diminishingReturns.formulaCaps: Movement speed caps at 150%. Other diminished attributes cap at 95%. Reload speed is additive and caps at 60%.
diminishingReturns.formulaOpposing: Positive and negative changes diminish separately, then oppose each other additively.
diminishingReturns.conditionalWarning: Descriptions control applicability. A result only applies while every listed condition is true; effects aimed at different targets or attack types do not necessarily overlap.
diminishingReturns.loadoutLoginRequired: Log in and verify a linked Paladins account to import saved decks.
diminishingReturns.loadoutUnavailable: Saved loadouts could not be loaded.
diminishingReturns.savedLoadoutsDescript: Choose a deck to load its champion, talent, cards, and card levels. Match items are not part of saved decks.
diminishingReturns.noSavedLoadouts: No saved loadouts are cached for this linked player.
diminishingReturns.invalidPointTotal: A legal five-card deck uses exactly 15 points; this calculator still shows the current experiment.
diminishingReturns.estimatedDisclaimer: This is an estimate from reference descriptions, not a live game simulation. Internal effect buckets and patch-specific exceptions can produce different results.
